hero.tagline: 5+ years owning enterprise infrastructure & endpoint governance
hero.subtagline: Cloud-native · Hybrid cloud · Automation · Endpoint compliance

about.title: About
about.summary: Infrastructure engineer with 5+ years owning enterprise IT and endpoint governance at Decathlon APAC. Architected a hybrid-cloud POS migration covering 2,000+ terminals across 13 APAC markets and built a cloud imaging platform from scratch that now serves 5,000+ endpoints. Deep in Kubernetes, hybrid cloud, and IT automation. HCIE-Cloud, CKA, CISP, RHCE. I measure myself in uptime, MTTR, and cost per endpoint — not slide count.

categories.name: Containers & Orchestration
items: Kubernetes (CKA) — cluster planning, Helm, on-call troubleshooting

categories.name: Cloud & Architecture
items: AWS / GCP / Huawei Cloud / VMware vSphere
Hybrid-cloud architecture, cross-cloud image sync, HA design

categories.name: Observability & Security
items: Fortify SCA, WAF, firewall, full log analytics

highlights: Spearheaded infrastructure reliability across 300+ APAC stores and 2,000+ endpoints — built predictive alerting on top of performance baselines, hitting 99.9% uptime and cutting MTTR 40%
Authored 50+ technical docs and ran 20 internal training sessions, lifting regional first-line self-recovery from 30% to 75% — equivalent to ~3 FTE capacity reallocated to strategic work

Architected a from-scratch HA cloud imaging system supporting 5,000+ endpoints on PXE + cloud storage + Git — cut per-device imaging time from 2h to 30min (60% efficiency gain) and supported 13-country rapid deployment, saving an estimated ¥3M+ in labor annually
Led the end-to-end APAC migration of 2,000+ POS terminals from CentOS 7 to Windows 10 IoT across hybrid cloud (see project section) — zero business disruption

Built a mobile device management (MDM) platform from scratch, onboarding 1,000+ mobile endpoints with 98% compliance — selected bare-metal + VCenter cluster to meet China PIPL data-residency requirements

items.company: Shanghai Huaxun Network System Co., Ltd.
highlights: Owned IT infrastructure solution design for 10+ enterprise customers — architected the SIPG (Shanghai International Port Group) ITIL 4 hybrid-cloud O&M platform covering 2,000+ nodes, integrating Zabbix + Ansible + ServiceNow
Facilitated 12 requirements workshops surfacing 30+ functional points; shipped 5 standardized solution templates covering AWS and asset-management domains
Owned POC validation and delivery for finance and retail customers — closed 5 critical POCs (Pufa Credit Card, Bank of Yinzhou Ningbo, Starbucks AMS) at 100% technical acceptance
Built Shell/Python automation for deployment and monitoring with 100% on-site incident resolution; shipped 15+ platform manuals and training kits
Architected JD's 2,000+ endpoint desktop-cloud deployment on a HA design

Built the enterprise security program — deployed Fortify SCA and related products covering 2,000+ endpoints and 300+ servers, resolved 100+ security incidents; led the IAM zero-trust project to production
Contributed to the security posture platform with full log ingestion; designed ITIL-based Jira incident/change workflows that materially raised process standardization

Owned large-scale system migrations end-to-end: Confluence cross-DC scaling 200 → 2,000 users; Active Directory migration of 2,000+ accounts with zero disruption; full CDN migration cutting latency 30%

Built digital dashboard data APIs (Python ingestion + Spring Boot/Tomcat JSON) to power management dashboards; owned full lifecycle (requirements → deployment → training) of the OKR system and contractor management system — the latter built 0 to 1

items.name: Decathlon APAC POS Terminal OS Migration
items.background: Migrated 2,000+ POS terminals from CentOS 7 to Windows 10 IoT across 13 APAC markets ahead of the CentOS 7 EOL — without a single business disruption.
highlights: Architected a hybrid-cloud imaging stack on PXE + cloud storage + Git with multi-version POS middleware adaptation
Built fault-tolerant PowerShell automation integrating POS middleware auto-deploy
Optimized GCP/AWS cross-cloud image sync — cut per-device imaging time from 8h to 3.5h (56% faster)
Built automated incident-response workflows on Rundeck — cut remote-ticket operations 80%
Shipped a store-level self-service O&M toolkit that drove ticket volume down 50% in 3 months
items.result: Migrated 2,000+ POS terminals with zero business disruption, 99.95% success rate, saving 1,500+ person-hours (~¥225K+ in engineering cost)

items.name: Workspace ONE MDM China Localization
items.background: Localized the French SaaS Workspace ONE endpoint management platform to comply with China PIPL. Led 6 in-house + 5 vendor engineers.
highlights: Ran SWOT across public cloud vs. on-prem DC; selected bare-metal + VCenter cluster architecture
Built Windows/macOS zero-touch migration scripts (PowerShell/Shell) with 99% execution success in robustness testing
Designed a phased migration strategy to dodge server-load and network-bandwidth bottlenecks
Hardened the platform with firewall + WAF; authored the build manual, O&M runbook, and SLA standards
items.result: 100% endpoint migration with zero disruption, built a PIPL-compliant endpoint management system

items.name: Decathlon China Android POS Hardware Innovation
items.background: Replaced the existing Windows POS hardware (high power draw, limited extensibility, unsustainable O&M cost) with a lightweight Android POS platform and a new in-store hardware standard.
highlights: Owned terminal hardware architecture decision: evaluated performance, stability, extensibility, TCO; selected an Android host platform aligned with long-term business evolution
Drove industrial design + system architecture co-engineering: orchestrated the vendor ID team on chassis layout, hardware integration, and peripheral interfacing
Extended the existing MDM with hardware telemetry, enabling remote diagnostics, proactive alerting, and a closed-loop O&M system
Spearheaded the RFID identification subsystem: owned reader module selection, frequency tuning, circuit adaptation; ran in-depth tag/sensitivity/anti-interference tests
items.result: Finalized and piloted the new-generation Android POS hardware: 40% hardware CapEx reduction (~¥2M+), 99.8% RFID identification success rate, 70% faster bulk-item read throughput, and predictive terminal-failure alerting — completing the APAC POS hardware standardization ecosystem

items.name: SIPG IT Unified O&M Management Platform
items.background: Designed an ITIL 4-aligned hybrid-cloud O&M platform for Shanghai International Port Group, consolidating fragmented toolchains.
highlights: Surveyed 2,000+ nodes and ran 12 requirements workshops, delivering a 30+ functional-point SRS
Architected a unified portal integrating Zabbix monitoring + Ansible automation + ServiceNow ITSM
Built the POC environment and validated cross-system data interoperability
items.result: Closed Phase-1 ¥1M contract, laid groundwork for Phase-2 ¥3M expansion

items.name: AsiaInfo Contractor Digital Management Platform
items.background: Replaced manual contractor management (200+ headcount, error-prone, no workflow closure) with a digital platform covering the full contractor lifecycle — delivered as a 0-to-1 build.
highlights: Owned requirements and system architecture: interviewed regional assistants and HR, mapped 8 core processes (on/offboarding, attendance, payroll), defined three modules (employee records, approval workflow, data dashboard)
Built the platform with OA integration for end-to-end approval automation, plus an employee-profile module for team-structure and headcount visualization
Authored the SOP manual, ran 10+ regional training sessions, and stood up a tiered issue-response mechanism
Lifted on/offboarding efficiency 96%, cut HR management time 50%, and drove payroll error rate to zero
items.result: End-to-end digitalization of contractor management — 96% faster on/offboarding, 50% reduction in HR time, zero payroll errors; reusable methodology and platform assets rolled out across AsiaInfo regional HR
